Hatuey Campbell Director · 18 years engineering experience
01
📄
Implementation Plan
View the full confidential Electric Bus Implementation Plan v5 — strategy, governance, financials, and timeline for 40 × 22-seater buses.
Covers fleet specification, route allocation, charging infrastructure, HR plan, legal framework, risk register, and the full 2026–2028 master schedule. Read-only — no download.
View Document →
02
📊
Plan Summary & Visualizations
Interactive dashboard with animated route maps, financial models, governance timeline, KPI targets, and charging infrastructure overview.
Includes live fleet operation simulations, revenue projections, phase transition timelines, and key metrics — designed for board-level presentations and stakeholder briefings.
Explore Dashboard →
03
💬
Submit Feedback
Share your thoughts, recommendations, or questions on the implementation plan. All submissions are visible to authorised users.
Feedback is shared with the Electric Bus Implementation Task Force (EBITF). Include your name, a clear title, and your detailed comments or recommendations.
Give Feedback →
